summary: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Merchant debit_account.balance is now correctly decremented when confirming cash payments. Tested 2 pending transactions - both properly debited merchant account and credited client cashback.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix at line 1365 in /app/backend/routers/merchants.py correctly adds '$inc': {'debit_account.balance': -cashback_amount} to the db.merchants.update_one() call
The fix ensures merchant's debit_account.balance in the merchants collection is debited when confirming cash payments

success_rate.backend: 100% - All merchant debit balance tests passed (5 passed, 1 skipped)

seed_data_creation: Used 2 existing pending cash transactions for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Merchant debit_account.balance now correctly decremented on cash payment confirmation. Current merchant balance: -3.23 GHS (after 2 confirmations of 0.71 and 1.19 GHS). No pending cash payments remaining.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When merchant confirms cash payment, debit_account.balance was NOT being debited
bug_fix_verification.verification_summary: Both transactions correctly debited merchant account and credited client cashback. Bug is FIXED.
